'''Iesei''' was a [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] hive that once lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. They were encountered by [[Vector Hyllus]] and [[Cipher Nine]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]. During the [[Swarm War]], the Iesei lived on a desert planet that came under [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] attack.

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' both [[Vector Hyllus]] and [[Daizanna]] pronounce the name of the nest as "Lesei", mistaking the uppercase "I" for lowercase "L". This is an obvious mistake, as all known Killik names are proper palindromes.
